Decision: Implement a simple transformer-based KT model with skill+correct embeddings and self-attention, train for more epochs.

trajectory.description: Observation: SAKT got 0.7496 AUC, similar to DKT. Overfits quickly after epoch 5. Analysis: The transformer overfits this small dataset (2180 sequences). DKT-style LSTM with stronger regularization may work better. Decision: Switch back to LSTM-based DKT with dropout, train fewer epochs with early stopping. Also use larger embedding for skill+correct interaction.

trajectory.description: Observation: DKT got 0.7584 AUC. Analysis: Try DKVMN-like or attention-augmented DKT. Simpler: try larger model + more dropout, or add attention over past hidden states for the next skill query (SAKT-DKT hybrid). Decision: Try a stronger model - add attention layer on top of LSTM output queried by next skill embedding. Also try a bidirectional approach is invalid (causality). Let me add multi-head self-attention causal over interaction embeddings combined with LSTM (hybrid).

trajectory.command_output_summary:
c.to(device), l.to(device)
        logits = model(s, c, l)
        T = s.shape[1]
        mask = torch.arange(T-1, device=device).unsqueeze(0) < (l.unsqueeze(1) - 1)
        probs = torch.sigmoid(logits)
        # iterate per row to keep order
        for i in range(s.size(0)):
            row_mask = mask[i]
            all_preds.extend(probs[i][row_mask].cpu().tolist())

with open(args.output, 'w') as f:
    json.dump({'predictions': all_preds}, f)
print('wrote', len(all_preds), 'predictions')

trajectory.description: Observation: Best so far is 0.7584 (simple DKT). Hybrid attention got 0.7582 test despite 0.7608 val. Analysis: small dataset, easy to overfit. Try ensemble or better regularization. Let me try a stronger DKT variant with skill-specific output (predict over all skills, gather next skill) which is the original DKT formulation. Decision: implement classic DKT predicting over all skills with gather, train with more dropout and longer.
